creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #1)
Having enabled UNICODE61 for sqlite3 (why is ICU not sufficient?)
next is:

 > dino
Fatal error: Shared object "libgssapi.so.10" not found, required by "libsoup-2.4.so.1"

Here is:
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl
OPTIONS_UNSET+=GSSAPI

Does dino really need GSSAPI? If not we should have a port option instead.
